claim_bullets.bullet_text: Monsters using magic are more formidable, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240); Monster level indicates event size, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240); NPCs as enemies are two levels greater, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240); Special attacks require mental power resistance rolls, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).
Poison and parasitism make life force resistance rolls, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).
Disease, strangling, capture, entangling, swallow whole, bloodsuck, acid, corrosion, steal mental power, iron corrosion are special attacks, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).
Resistance to weapons, magic, and similar attacks are special defense abilities, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).
Weaknesses are special defense abilities, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).

source_record_text: Chapter 13.6 of the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition covers handling monster special abilities, detailing various attacks and defenses. Not specified.
